subtitle: Gaze into the mystic orb and ask your question...
noHistory: No questions asked yet. The orb awaits...
footer: The orb sees all, knows all, tells some.

answers.yes: Yes, the stars align in your favor.
answers.certainly: Certainly, without a shadow of doubt.
answers.askAgain: Ask again when the moon is full.
answers.likely: It is likely, the signs are promising.
answers.absolutely: Absolutely! The universe conspires in your favor!
answers.neverInAMillionYears: Never in a million years shall this come to pass.
answers.theFutureIsUnclear: The future is unclear, shrouded in cosmic fog.
answers.withoutADoubt: Without a doubt, this shall be.
answers.outlookGood: Outlook good, the stars smile upon you.
